title: Ramayanam

title: Punitha
desc: Maragatham's relationship with her stepdaughter Punitha gets rocky due to Kabilan. Will love triumph over their differences, or is their bond too fragile to withstand the strain?

desc: Compassionate Sathya clashes with proud, money-driven Selvanayagi. Facing trials of morality and courage, she fights to uphold justice and protect her loved ones.
